html:
Exclusive to:

“Makes a hot spring all warm, steamy, and glassy when dropped in.”

-

The Bath Bomb is a perishable, craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted with 1 Lune Tree Blossom and 1 Nitre while standing near the Celestial Altar. One Bath Bomb spawns naturally near a Hot Spring and a Skeleton.

Bath Bombs can be thrown into Hot Springs and Pearl's Hot Spring, causing them to emit steam more rapidly for one day, as well as produce heat and light. After throwing in Bath Bombs, player can soak in the Hot Springs to regenerate Health and Sanity.

After a Bath Bomb has been tossed into a Hot Spring, Saladmanders will be attracted to it and will turn ripe after being near it for enough time. During a Full Moon, all Hot Springs that have had a Bath Bomb tossed in them will change to have a Moon Glass rock in the center. Mining the Moon Glass rock will drop 5 Moon Shards and rarely a Red Gem or Blue Gem. After being mined, the Hot Spring will return to normal.

Trivia

  • Bath Bombs were introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • The crafting description of the item is a reference to the movie 'The Devil wears Prada'.
  • Bath Bomb used to spoil after 6 days before the Winter's Feast 2025 update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"bathbomb"
“It's just textbook chemistry.”
–Wilson
“I still don't want to take a bath.”
–Willow
“Is for prettifying little hotbath.”
–Wolfgang
“To mask the smell of sorrow and death.”
–Wendy
“FOR ATTACKING THOSE HATEFUL LIQUID PITS”
–WX-78
“Ah, I do love a warm bath with a book.”
–Wickerbottom
“Smells nice, like wildflowers.”
–Woodie
“It smells quite nice, if I'm honest.”
–Maxwell
“I shall töss thee in the earth's cauldrön!”
–Wigfrid
“I miss bubble baths.”
–Webber
“A bath would be nice.”
–Warly
“Friends made a ball!”
–Wormwood
“I'm not really the frou-frou type.”
–Winona
“Sweetly stinking, bombs for bathing.”
–Wortox
“Wanna throw it now!”
–Wurt
“It smells pretty good.”
–Walter
“It might be nice to have a warm bath and unwind for a moment or two.”
–Wanda
“Makes a hot spring all warm, steamy, and glassy when dropped in.”
-
The Bath Bomb is a perishable, craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted with 1 Lune Tree Blossom and 1 Nitre while standing near the Celestial Altar. One Bath Bomb spawns naturally near a Hot Spring and a Skeleton.
Bath Bombs can be thrown into Hot Springs and Pearl's Hot Spring, causing them to emit steam more rapidly for one day, as well as produce heat and light. After throwing in Bath Bombs, player can soak in the Hot Springs to regenerate Health and Sanity.
After a Bath Bomb has been tossed into a Hot Spring, Saladmanders will be attracted to it and will turn ripe after being near it for enough time. During a Full Moon, all Hot Springs that have had a Bath Bomb tossed in them will change to have a Moon Glass rock in the center. Mining the Moon Glass rock will drop 5 Moon Shards and rarely a Red Gem or Blue Gem. After being mined, the Hot Spring will return to normal.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bom Tắm là một vật phẩm dễ hư hỏng, có thể chế tạo được dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó được chế tạo bằng 1 Hoa Nguyệt Quế và 1 Tiêu Tiêu khi đứng gần Bàn thờ Thiên thể. Một Bom Tắm xuất hiện tự nhiên gần Suối Nước Nóng và Bộ Xương.

The '''Bath Bomb''' is a perishable, craftable item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is crafted with 1 [[Lune Tree Blossom]] and 1 [[Nitre]] while standing near the [[Celestial Altar]]. One Bath Bomb spawns naturally near a [[Hot Spring]] and a [[Skeleton/DST|Skeleton]].

Bath Bombs can be thrown into Hot Springs and [[Pearl's Hot Spring]], causing them to emit steam more rapidly for one day, as well as produce heat and light. After throwing in Bath Bombs, player can soak in the Hot Springs to regenerate [[Health]] and [[Sanity]].

After a Bath Bomb has been tossed into a Hot Spring, [[Saladmander]]s will be attracted to it and will turn ripe after being near it for enough time. During a [[Full Moon]], all Hot Springs that have had a Bath Bomb tossed in them will change to have a Moon Glass rock in the center. Mining the Moon Glass rock will drop 5 [[Moon Shard]]s and rarely a [[Red Gem]] or [[Blue Gem]]. After being mined, the Hot Spring will return to normal.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Bath Bombs were introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Turn of Tides|Turn of Tides]]'' update.
* The crafting description of the item is a reference to the movie 'The Devil wears Prada'.
* Bath Bomb used to spoil after 6 days before the [[Winter's Feast 2025]] update.
